name: list
description: List all research threads with their status. Use this to see what topics are being tracked and their current state (active/paused/resolved). For a summary of just active threads, use digest instead.

name: show
description: Display full details of a specific research thread including all notes, sources, and findings. Use this to review the complete history of a thread. For a quick overview of all threads, use list instead.

id.description: Thread ID (slug) or prefix to match. Use list to find thread IDs.

name: add
description: Create a new research thread with a title. The thread ID is auto-generated as a slug from the title. Use this to start tracking a new topic for ongoing research.

name: note
description: Add a dated research note to a thread. Use this to record observations, questions, or context during research. Notes are timestamped automatically.

id.description: Thread ID (slug) or prefix to match

name: source
description: Add a source or reference URL to a thread. Use this to bookmark useful links, articles, or data sources for later review. Optionally include a description.

id.description: Thread ID (slug) or prefix to match

name: finding
description: Record a key finding or insight from research. Use this to capture important discoveries, conclusions, or actionable items. For adding general notes, use note instead.

id.description: Thread ID (slug) or prefix to match

name: status
description: Change the status of a research thread. Use this to pause a thread (temporarily inactive), mark it resolved (research complete), or reactivate a paused thread.

id.description: Thread ID (slug) or prefix to match

name: digest
description: Get a summary of all active research threads. Use this for a quick overview of what's being tracked. For detailed thread information including notes and sources, use show instead.

name: decay
description: Prune stale threads that have been inactive for more than 90 days with no recent notes. This helps keep the thread list manageable. Use list to review threads before running decay.

name: covered
description: Show topics and URLs that have been covered in recent research reports. Use this to avoid duplicating research - check what was already covered before starting new research. Default looks back 14 days.

days.description: Number of days to look back (default 14)
